content.full_text:
This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the provisions of the
Political Reform Act (the "Act").1 As specified on our web site, the role of the Political
Reform Act (the'Act") is as follows:
Farn PolrrrcAt- PnacrrcEs C oMMrssroN
P.O. Box ggl c 428 J Street o Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 o Fax (916) 322-0886
August 19,2002
Frederick Lee Christensen Architects
295 Main Street, Suite 300
Salinas, CA 93901
Re:
Your Request for Advice
Our File No. G-02-220
Dear Mr. Christensen
ThE MiSSiON Of thE FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION iS tO
promote the integrity of representative state and local government in California
through fair, irtpartial interpretation and enforcement of political campaign,
lobbying, and conflict of interest laws.
It does not appear from the limited information you forwarded, that you or your
attorney are public officials regulated under the purview of the Act. Regulation
18329(b)(8)(D) provides that the Commission may decline to provide advice where the
request does not present a question under the Political Reform Act. (See also, Reg.
18329(c)@)(F), copy enclosed.) Thus, we would not be the agency to respond to your
request.
Also enclosed is a pamphlet entitled, "Cattl Vote?" which may assist you when
determining whether a conflict exists on a particular issue before you or your attorney.
Should you have any additional questions, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.
Sincerely,
Luisa Menchaca
allace
General Counsel
Enclosures
Jwwjg
I Govemment Code sections 81000 - 91014. Commission regulations appear atTitte2,sections 18109-
18997, of the Califomia Code of Regulations.
@

sections.conclusion: It does not appear from the limited information you forwarded, that you or your attorney are public officials regulated under the purview of the Act. Regulation 18329(b)(8)(D) provides that the Commission may decline to provide advice where the request does not present a question under the Political Reform Act. Thus, we would not be the agency to respond to your request.
sections.question_synthetic: The requestor sought FPPC advice regarding the Political Reform Act, but the specific legal question is not detailed in this document.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC declined to provide advice because the requestor did not appear to be a public official regulated under the Political Reform Act, and the request did not present a question within the Commission's jurisdiction.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Declination letter with no detailed question section. The FPPC response explains why they cannot respond rather than addressing a substantive legal question. Enclosures mentioned but not included in provided text.

CONCLUSION: It does not appear from the limited information you forwarded, that you or your attorney are public officials regulated under the purview of the Act. Regulation 18329(b)(8)(D) provides that the Commission may decline to provide advice where the request does not present a question under the Political Reform Act. Thus, we would not be the agency to respond to your request.

embedding.summary: The FPPC declined to provide advice to Frederick Lee Christensen Architects regarding the Political Reform Act, determining that the requestor was not a public official regulated under the Act and the request fell outside the Commission's purview.
